front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Time Watcher — the 2nd advancement of the Time Guardian class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: advanced Time Guardian with semi-plate armor plus massive gear backpack mechanism, goggles equipped, time manipulation gauntlets on both hands, time freeze field projection, concentric semi-transparent time distortion rings around character. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
